source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Last_BP_Avail_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS Last_BP_Avail_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Last_BP_Avail_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS Last_BP_Avail_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Last_BP_Avail_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS Last_BP_Avail_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'File_from_PCF_Dropzone_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS File_from_PCF_Dropzone_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'File_from_PCF_Dropzone_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS File_from_PCF_Dropzone_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'File_from_PCF_Dropzone_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS File_from_PCF_Dropzone_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'PCF_All_data327_') AS PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'PCF_All_data327_') AS PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'PCF_All_data327_') AS PCF_Build_Packs_All_Mappings_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Last_Available_BP_Names325__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326_') AS Sharepoint_TAS_Buildpacks_New_PCF_File_Format326__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PCF_Weekly_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_PCF_All_data327__sink_TableName;

scripts.text:
SELECT 
 convert(varchar(8),cast(currentdate as date),112) Friday
FROM 
dbo.calendar
where cast(Getdate() as date) = cast(currentdate as date)
